{"query":"Oppenheimer Holdings David Fleming Ron Guidi private client division San Francisco branch manager appointment 2026","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1785,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/oppenheimer-adds-david-fleming-to-private-client-division-leadership-team-302737654.html","title":"Oppenheimer Adds David Fleming to Private Client Division Leadership Team","content":"Inc., a leading wealth manager and investment bank and a subsidiary of Oppenheimer Holdings Inc.
(NYSE: OPY), today announced that David Fleming has been promoted to a leadership role within the firm's Private Client Division.
In a related move, Ron Guidi will become Branch Manager in San Francisco, replacing Fleming in that role.
These changes come amid continued growth across Oppenheimer's Private Client Division.
Under his leadership, the branch grew revenue by 36% and assets by 34%, while adding seven advisors.
About Oppenheimer Holdings Inc.Oppenheimer Holdings Inc., through its principal subsidiary Oppenheimer & Co.
For more information, please visit www.oppenheimer.com."},{"url":"https://pulse2.com/oppenheimer-promotes-david-fleming-to-private-client-division-leadership-as-ron-guidi-takes-san-francisco-role/","title":"Oppenheimer Promotes David Fleming To Private Client Division Leadership As Ron Guidi Takes San Francisco Role","content":"Fleming, who will be based in New York, will report to Ed Harrington, Executive Vice President and Head of the Private Client Division.
In his new role, he will oversee branches in select markets, working closely with regional and branch managers to drive business development, enhance team performance, and support advisor recruiting efforts.
As part of the leadership transition, Ron Guidi has been appointed Branch Manager in San Francisco, succeeding Fleming.
Guidi will be responsible for managing day-to-day operations and expanding the firm’s presence in the Bay Area.
He brings more than 30 years of industry experience, including roles at firms such as Stifel, Barclays, Deutsche Bank, Credit Suisse, and Donaldson, Lufkin & Jenrette.
Pulse 2.0 Newsletter Daily business and finance intelligence."},{"url":"https://www.investmentnews.com/practice-management/oppenheimer-elevates-david-fleming-to-expanded-leadership-role-in-private-client-division/266090","title":"Oppenheimer elevates David Fleming to expanded leadership role in Private Client Division - InvestmentNews","content":"Inc. has promoted David Fleming into a senior leadership position within its Private Client Division, part of a broader leadership realignment as the firm builds on recent momentum.
"Dave has done an outstanding job leading our San Francisco office, and this promotion reflects the confidence we have in his ability to shape the next chapter of growth across the Private Client Division," Harrington said.
At the same time, we are excited to welcome Ron, a seasoned leader with deep roots in the Bay Area, and we believe he will continue the momentum Dave created in that office."
Fleming joined the firm in 2022 to lead its San Francisco office, where he oversaw significant gains.
Guidi brings more than 26 years of experience advising high-net-worth individuals and senior executives, with prior roles at Rockefeller Capital Management, Deutsche Bank and Robertson Stephens.
Robert Lowenthal, President and CEO of Oppenheimer, said the appointments underscore the firm’s focus on strengthening its advisor base and leadership bench."}]}
